This advisory has been withdrawn because it is a duplicate of GHSA-c4qg-j8jg-42q5. This link is maintained to preserve external references.

### Original Description
OpenClaw before 2026.4.20 contains a server-side request forgery vulnerability in QQBot direct media upload that skips URL validation. Attackers can bypass SSRF protections by sending crafted image URLs to uploadC2CMedia and uploadGroupMedia endpoints to relay unintended requests.", "ghsa_id": "GHSA-r747-33r4-rmjw", "github_reviewed_at": "2026-05-11T16:12:55Z", "html_url": "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-r747-33r4-rmjw", "identifiers": [{"type": "GHSA", "value": "GHSA-r747-33r4-rmjw"}], "nvd_published_at": "2026-05-06T20:16:35Z", "published_at": "2026-05-06T21:31:42Z", "references": ["https://github.com/openclaw/openclaw/security/advisories/GHSA-c4qg-j8jg-42q5", "https://nvd.nist.gov/vuln/detail/CVE-2026-44117", "https://github.com/openclaw/openclaw/commit/49db424c8001f2f419aad85f434894d8d85c1a09", "https://www.vulncheck.com/advisories/openclaw-server-side-request-forgery-in-qqbot-direct-media-upload", "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-r747-33r4-rmjw"], "repository_advisory_url": null, "severity": "medium", "source_code_location": "", "summary": "Duplicate Advisory: OpenClaw: QQBot direct media upload skipped URL SSRF validation", "type": "reviewed", "updated_at": "2026-05-11T16:12:58Z", "url": "https://api.github.com/advisories/GHSA-r747-33r4-rmjw", "vulnerabilities": [{"first_patched_version": "2026.4.20", "package": {"ecosystem": "npm", "name": "openclaw"}, "vulnerable_functions": [], "vulnerable_version_range": "< 2026.4.20"}], "withdrawn_at": "2026-05-11T16:12:55Z"}
